---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 12pt
    geometry: margin=2.5cm
    engine: xelatex
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fontspec}
        \setmainfont{Arial}
        \definecolor{journalpurple}{RGB}{173,37,168}
    keep-tex: true
---

\begin{titlepage}
    \noindent
    \begin{tabular*}{\textwidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}lcr}
    Vol. 1. No. 2 & \textbf{NUEVA ÉPOCA} & abr-jun 2026
\end{tabular*}
    \vspace{0.5cm}
    \noindent
    \rule{\textwidth}{1pt}
    
    \vspace{4cm}
    
    \begin{center}
        {\color{journalpurple}\fontsize{36}{44}\selectfont\bfseries An@lítica}
        
        \vspace{2cm}
        
        {\LARGE\bfseries Título del dossier}
    \end{center}
    
    \vfill
    \begin{center}
        \includegraphics[width=8cm]{static/uam_logo.png}
    \end{center}
\end{titlepage}

\setcounter{page}{1}
